markdownRemark.html:
List of DNS Providers

  • Namecheap
  • Name.com
  • GoDaddy

Setting Up Proper Redirecting for GitHub Pages Site

  • Go to DNS provider and go to Advanced DNS

    • Add the new CNAME record

    • Add a bunch of A records for GitHub pages

      185.199.108.153
185.199.109.153
185.199.110.153
185.199.111.153
    • Delete CNAME file in site repo and re-add

Site Security

  • There is the need for you to get a SSL Certificate
  • SSL Certificates last 3 years, so you have to renew it each time

  • How to get the certificate:

    • Let's Encrypt

    • Guide

      • https://www.linode.com/docs/security/ssl/install-lets-encrypt-to-create-ssl-certificates/
